node.statement: CANCELLATION + ASSEMBLY. CLAIM: P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa)=P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa)) EXACTLY, hence ||((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa-(a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. PROOF of cancellation: node 1.3.1 proves the symmetric ambient Jordan identity (a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa=a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa) as an exact identity of elements of B(H)_sa (derived from GT-jordan-identity + commutativity GT-jordan-product). Applying the well-defined real-linear map P to both sides of this exact equality of elements of B(H)_sa gives P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa)=P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa)). ASSEMBLY: by node 1.1, ((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa=P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa)+E_L; by node 1.2, (a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa)=P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa))+E_R; with ||E_L||,||E_R||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Subtracting and using the cancellation P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa)=P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa)): ((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa-(a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa)=E_L-E_R, so ||((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa-(a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa)||<=||E_L||+||E_R||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. This is exactly the contract (JB4, def eps-jb-algebra). Uses node 1.1, node 1.2, node 1.3.1, GT-jordan-identity, GT-jordan-product, def near-fixed-algebra, def jordan-product.
